_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the extraction record shape. The MINE extractor and this scorer MUST use these exact field names. Benchmark mapping: genes->BioRED gene, species->BioRED species, cell_types->JNLPBA cell-type, frequencies->MeasEval (quantities + measured entity), gating_thresholds->MeasEval (quantities). surface_markers + signatures have no public benchmark (known gap, not scored). relevance + tissue are internal (not scored). The code mirror of this is fields.py.
